# External Template Structure - Interview Scorecard

## Purpose
Define structured interview scoring patterns used by ATS platforms.

## Source Pattern References
- Greenhouse scorecard structures.
- Workable structured interview patterns.

## Canonical Sections
1. Interview context (candidate, role, interviewer, date).
2. Competency dimensions.
3. Evidence notes per dimension.
4. Numeric score per dimension.
5. Final hire recommendation.

## Core Dimensions
| Dimension | Evidence | Score (1-5) | Notes |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Technical fundamentals | | | |
| Troubleshooting process quality | | | |
| Communication clarity | | | |
| Customer empathy | | | |
| Collaboration and ownership | | | |
| Hire recommendation | | | |

## Usage Guidance
Use to normalize interviewer evaluations and reduce subjective drift.
